from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional

def process_items(items: Optional[List[str]] = None) -> List[str]:
    if items is None:
        items = []
    items.append("processed")
    return items

def build_config(overrides: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    config = {"default": True}
    if overrides:
        config.update(overrides)
    return config

def create_record(tags: Optional[List[str]] = None, metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> dict:
    return {"tags": tags or [], "metadata": metadata or {}}

def aggregate_results(data: Optional[List[dict]] = None, key: str = "value") -> List[Any]:
    if data is None:
        data = []
    return [item[key] for item in data]

def transform_batch(items: Optional[List[int]] = None, factor: float = 1.0) -> List[float]:
    if items is None:
        items = []
    return [x * factor for x in items]
